updateNote: Day 79 (05:13 AM PDT May 17): Drone strikes Barakah Nuclear Plant perimeter UAE — first attack on any nuclear facility in the war; no radiation release. IDF struck ~100 Hezbollah targets over weekend; Golani weeklong Litani River raid. Lebanon: 18 killed + 124 wounded in last 24h (running total 2,987 killed / 9,236 wounded). USS Gerald R. Ford returns to Norfolk after record 326-day (11-month) deployment — longest US carrier deployment since Vietnam. Iran-linked hackers breach US gas station ATG systems; FBI/CISA investigating. Araghchi at BRICS: 'We have no trust in the US.' BRICS ends without joint communique. Netanyahu cabinet: 'Our eyes are open regarding Iran — prepared for any scenario.' Brent $111.3, WTI $106.5. Gas $4.52. Blockade Day 76.
dataFreshnessWarning: Last updated 05:13 AM PDT on May 17, 2026
